title: myosotis lyallii subsp. elderi
intro: Myosotis lyallii subsp. elderi, also known as Elder's Forget-me-not, is a subspecies of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of alkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as colds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as to soothe sore throats and reduce inflammation. Myosotis lyallii subsp. elderi can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and health benefits.
